name: Cranberry Salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the peel and all white membrane from oranges.
2. Grate or zest 4 tablespoons of the orange peel.
3. Coarsely chop the orange sections.
4. Coarsely chop fresh cranberries.
5. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
6. Season to taste with salt.
7. Let sit at least 3-4 hours before serving.
